'''Yan Vrees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who lived on [[Hok/Legends|Hok]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

A [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and card shark, he owed a large sum of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] as the result of losing a high-stakes game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crimelord. After Yrees bolted in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Jabba posted a bounty on him, which was collected by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the Game his name is "Yan Vrees". While the strategy Guide says his name as Yan Yrees.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
